decision: Role-native context injection at boot — chorus query per role in native token format

steps.action: Role-native context injection at boot — chorus query per role in native token format
steps.notes: Implemented context mode in chorus-query.sh + wired into werk-init.sh. All 3 roles produce dense boot signals.

Reviewed and verified. chorus-query.sh context mode produces role-native dense signals from chorus.log. werk-init.sh wires it into parallel boot data gathering. All 3 roles get domain-appropriate context at session start. Clean integration, proper fallbacks.
